headline: Buffett Bet Big On Visa, Mastercard Stocks 15 Years Ago: Here's How Much Those Positions Gained
summary: In his first quarter as the new CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, Greg Abel made his presence felt. The new CEO, who replaced long time leader Warren Buffett, made multiple changes to the conglomerate's investment portfolio, including selling off stakes in...
